title: Restrict file access in WebViews
description: Allowing file access in WebViews can expose applications to serious security risks, including unauthorized file reads and code execution. File access should only be enabled when absolutely necessary, and only for trusted content. Improper configuration may lead to sensitive data exposure or code injection attacks.
recommendation: Disable file access in WebViews unless strictly required. If enabled, ensure only trusted files are accessible and validate all input sources.

noncompliant:
WebView webView = ...;
webView.getSettings().setAllowFileAccess(true); // Unsafe if untrusted files are accessible
compliant:
WebView webView = ...;
webView.getSettings().setAllowFileAccess(false); // File access disabled for safety

checks.message: Disable file access in WebViews unless strictly required. If enabled, ensure only trusted files are accessible and validate all input sources.
